_comment: WHMCS support department map (from GetSupportDepartments discovery). FFC currently has ONE department (id 1, 'Support'); WHMCS departments are created in the admin UI, not via API. 'routing' maps logical ticket types to a deptid so ticket automation can re-point later if dedicated Onboarding/Break-Fix departments are added - just change the ids here. Until then both route to 1 and are distinguished by subject prefix + priority + GitHub label.
